query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.createdAt
FROM users u
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Paul%' OR u.name LIKE '%Lueth%' OR u.email LIKE '%lueth%' OR u.email LIKE '%paul%'
ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.createdAt
FROM users u

ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC;
